title: Construct Crates
description: An addon to Apple Crates supporting the Tinker's Construct mod
body:
![Applecrates & TinkersConstruct compat header](https://i.imgur.com/af3m1zP.png)
## Construct Crates 
 

_Mod is not affiliated with Tinker's Construct_
 

This mod needs both [Apple Crates](https://modrinth.com/mod/apple-crates) & [Tinker's Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct) to properly work.


____________________________________________________________________________________

 

 

### General Information :

Apple Crates is a mod that adds functional Crates in which you can stock items and set up shop.

This addon only adds in new crates, compatible with Tinker's Construct

 

The added crates are :

- Bloodshroom
- SkyRoot
- Greenheart
- Nahuatl
- Slimewood
- Enderbark
- Blazewood
